title: habenaria × chevallieriana
intro: Habenaria × chevallieriana, also known as Chevallier's orchid, is a hybrid orchid species that belongs to the genus Habenaria. It is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting relaxation. Habenaria × chevallieriana can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
